name: iOS Sideload Source (NSFW Coexist)
subtitle: iOS Sideload Source by Aiko3993
description: An automated iOS sideload source. Fetches the latest IPAs from GitHub Releases/Artifacts and builds a universal source.

apps.name: JHentai
apps.subtitle: A cross-platform manga app made for e-hentai & exhentai by Flutter.
apps.versionDescription:
注意：本次更新后在启动时会优化本地下载索引，以解决部分画廊标题过长的画廊无法下载归档的bug，如下载内容较多可提前备份应用目录下db.sqlite文件

- 桌面端阅读页支持自定义快捷键
- 桌面端支持ctrl+鼠标滚轮缩放图片
- ios支持音量键翻页
- 现在打开快速搜索列表时会记忆上一次打开时的偏移量
- 移动端支持为横屏和竖屏单独设置阅读方向
- 移动端支持为横屏和竖屏单独设置图片宽度比例
- 移动端阅读页支持复制图片
- 支持撤销标签投票结果
- 修复部分标题过长的画廊无法下载归档的bug

--------------------

Attention: After this update, the local download index will be optimized at startup to fix the bug where galleries with
overly long titles could not download archives. If you have a lot of downloaded content, you can back up the db.sqlite
file in the application directory in advance.

- Desktop reading page supports customizable keyboard shortcuts
- Desktop supports ctrl + mouse wheel to zoom images
- iOS supports volume key page turning
- Quick search list now remembers the scroll position from the last visit
- Mobile now supports setting reading direction separately for landscape and portrait orientations
- Mobile now supports setting image width ratio separately for landscape and portrait orientations
- Mobile reading page supports copying images
- Support undoing tag vote results
- Fixed bug where galleries with overly long titles could not download archives
apps.localizedDescription:
A manga app for E-Hentai, supporting Android & iOS & Windows & MacOS & Linux.

Still in development stage, welcome to submit issues or feature requests.

apps.name: LoveIwara
apps.subtitle: Love Iwara (i-iwara or 2i). An unofficial iwara flutter app - Supporting multiple platforms and devices including mobile phones, tablets and computers. Compatible with Android, Windows and other systems. 第三方的Iwara应用 - 支持多个平台和设备，包括手机、平板和计算机。兼容 安卓、IOS、Windows、MacOS等系统。
apps.versionDescription:
# 🚀 Release Notes for Version 0.5.0

## 🔥 Highlights

* **Customizable Shortcuts**: Every in-app shortcut is now customizable — you can freely reassign keys, with a dedicated shortcuts settings page to manage them. In the player, long-pressing left/right now enters continuous speed playback, instead of only triggering a single fast-forward/rewind as before.
* **Player Zoom & Rotate Gestures**: You can now zoom and rotate the player picture with a two-finger pinch (trackpad/touchscreen), or by holding Shift or Ctrl and scrolling the mouse wheel.
* **Player Display Controls**: The player offers per-player screen fit modes (Fit / Stretch / Fill / 16:9 / 4:3) that apply only to the current player, plus a color-vision assist filter with three color-blindness / color-weakness modes — now available for both the player and the gallery, each with its own independent switch.
* **Download Categories**: The download list now supports custom categories, choosing a category when downloading, batch deletion by date range / N days ago, and preserving scroll position after deletion. The completion toast moved to the bottom and is tappable to jump.
* **Smarter Search**: The search dialog layout was improved (Oreno3D entry / Google search / history confirmation), you can browse with only filters and sorting (no keyword required), and the results page can save and restore search conditions.
* **Tag Localization**: Oreno3d and iwara tags both support localization toggling, long-press for details, and a copy & translation-correction feedback dialog.
* **Smoother iOS Navigation**: Improved the back-navigation experience for iOS users on some pages.
* **Multi-Provider AI Translation**: AI translation now supports multiple providers — OpenAI (and compatible endpoints), Anthropic native, and Google native — with streaming output and collapsible reasoning. You can choose a provider preset and fetch the model list in settings.
* **Local Content Blocking**: Hide videos and galleries by keyword, regular expression, or author user ID. Rules are stored locally and included in the settings backup, with separate import/export for block rules. Blocked cards show a frosted mask and can be revealed temporarily.
* **Click-to-Seek Timestamps**: Time codes in video descriptions and comments (e.g. 1:23, 1:23:45) are now highlighted and tappable to jump straight to that point in the video.

## 🐛 Bug Fixes

* **Network Experience**: Improved the user network experience.
* **Video Preview Popup**: Fixed an issue where the video preview popup could not be displayed.
* **Navigation Deadlock**: Fixed back-navigation deadlocks caused by nested back interception.
* **Download List Stability**: Fixed download-list refresh races, duplicated history entries, and lists not refreshing after deletion.
* **Author Video Count**: Fixed the author profile showing a bogus video count stuck at 21.
* **Windows Fullscreen**: Fixed a page rendering issue when entering in-app fullscreen on Windows.
* **Startup Site**: The app now always starts on the main site instead of the remembered AI site, avoiding related issues.
* **iOS Sideloading**: Ad-hoc signed the embedded frameworks before packaging, fixing AltStore / SideStore sideload errors.

## 🛠 Optimizations

* **Narrow-screen Playback**: On narrow portrait screens you can now swipe up during playback to shrink the player to its minimum height.
* **Popular Filters**: Popular video / gallery filters gained a persistent entry and quick favorite-tag filtering.
* **Profile & Navigation Polish**: Author profile action buttons changed to labeled icon+text pills, and exiting from the home root now asks for confirmation.
* **Android Adaptive Icon**: Added adaptive launcher icons to fit the circular icon masks used by some regional ROMs.
* **Haptics & Stability**: Improved player haptic feedback (screen / progress horizontal-swipe seek), scaled download list items to screen width for a more compact small-screen layout, fixed several bugs, and improved overall stability.
* **Watch History Cleanup**: Added an auto-cleanup toggle with a retention-days setting, plus deleting history within a selected date range.
* **Customizable Navigation**: You can now hide the Forum and News navigation items for a cleaner navigation bar.
* **Playback & Downloads**: Added a default / auto playback speed setting, support for external SD/TF cards as a custom download location, and (on desktop) restored the "remember last volume" option.
* **First-time Gesture Guide**: Added a one-time gesture guide the first time you open a video detail page.

## 📢 How to Provide Feedback

* Leave a comment in the [GitHub issues section](https://github.com/FoxSensei001/LoveIwara/issues)
* Or join the [discussion group](https://t.me/+ITH4CV6Z_sc2ZWVl)

Your feedback is extremely valuable to us. Thank you for your continued support and help! 🚀

---

# 🚀 0.5.0 版本发布说明

## 🔥 重点更新

* **快捷键自定义**：应用内所有快捷键均支持自定义配置，可自由切换按键，并新增了快捷键设置页面供你管理。播放器中长按左/右可直接进入倍速播放，而不再像过去那样只触发一次快进/后退。
* **播放器画面缩放与旋转手势**：现在可以通过双指捏合（触控板/触屏），或按住 Shift、Ctrl 加鼠标滚轮，对播放器画面进行放大、缩小与旋转。
* **播放器画面显示控制**：播放器支持画面尺寸调节（适应 / 拉伸 / 填充 / 16:9 / 4:3，仅对当前播放器生效），并新增色觉辅助滤镜，提供三档色盲 / 色弱辅助模式（播放器与图库各自独立开关）。
* **下载分类管理**：下载列表新增自定义分类，下载时可选择分类，支持按日期区间 / N 天前批量删除，删除后保留滚动位置。完成提示移至底部并支持点击跳转。
* **更聪明的搜索**：搜索弹窗布局优化（Oreno3D 入口 / 谷歌搜索 / 历史确认），支持不输入关键词仅凭筛选与排序浏览，搜索结果页支持保存与还原搜索条件。
* **标签本地化**：Oreno3d 与 iwara 标签均支持本地化切换、长按查看详情，以及复制与翻译纠错反馈。
* **iOS 返回更顺手**：优化了 iOS 用户在部分页面里的返回操作体验。
* **AI 翻译多服务商**：AI 翻译新增多服务商接入——OpenAI（含兼容端点）、Anthropic 原生、Google 原生，支持流式输出与思考过程折叠展示，可在设置中选择服务商预设并拉取模型列表。
* **本地内容屏蔽**：可按关键词、正则或作者用户 ID 屏蔽视频与图库，规则仅存本地并随设置备份，也支持屏蔽规则单独导入导出。被屏蔽卡片以磨砂遮罩呈现，可临时显示。
* **时间节点点击跳转**：视频简介与评论中的时间节点（如 1:23、1:23:45）自动高亮，点击即可跳转到对应播放位置。

## 🐛 问题修复

* **网络体验**：优化用户网络体验。
* **视频预览弹窗**：修复了视频预览弹窗不能显示的问题。
* **返回卡死修复**：修复嵌套返回拦截导致的返回卡死。
* **下载列表稳定性**：修复下载列表刷新竞态、历史区重复项，以及删除后不刷新等问题。
* **作者作品数**：修复作者主页视频数恒显示 21 的错误。
* **Windows 全屏**：修复 Windows 端应用内全屏时页面显示异常的问题。
* **启动站点**：启动时强制进入主站而非记忆中的 AI 站，避免相关异常。
* **iOS 侧载修复**：打包前对内嵌 framework 进行 ad-hoc 签名，修复 AltStore / SideStore 侧载报错。

## 🛠 优化内容

* **窄屏播放优化**：窄屏竖屏播放状态下支持上滑，将播放器收缩至最小高度。
* **热门筛选优化**：热门视频 / 图库筛选项新增常驻入口与收藏快捷筛选。
* **主页与导航打磨**：作者主页操作按钮改为图标 + 文字胶囊样式，首页退出增加二次确认。
* **安卓自适应图标**：补齐 launcher 自适应图标，适配国内圆形图标遮罩。
* **触觉与稳定性**：优化播放器触觉反馈（画面 / 进度横滑 seek），下载列表元素按屏宽等比缩放让小屏更紧凑，修复若干 bug 并提升整体稳定性。
* **历史记录清理**：新增自动清理超期记录开关与保留天数设置，并支持按所选时间范围批量删除。
* **导航自定义**：支持隐藏论坛、新闻导航项，让导航栏更简洁。
* **播放与下载**：新增默认 / 自动播放速度设置，下载路径支持外置 SD/TF 卡作为自定义存储位置，桌面端恢复“记住上次音量”选项。
* **首次手势指引**：首次进入视频详情页时新增一次性手势操作指引。

## 📢 如何反馈问题

* 欢迎在 [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/FoxSensei001/LoveIwara/issues) 中留言反馈
* 或加入 [讨论群](https://t.me/+ITH4CV6Z_sc2ZWVl)

你的反馈对我们非常重要，感谢一直以来的支持与帮助！🚀
apps.localizedDescription: One codebase → Android · Windows · macOS · Linux · iOS

privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: App需要访问位置来获取WiFi信息

versions.localizedDescription:
# 🚀 Release Notes for Version 0.5.0

## 🔥 Highlights

* **Customizable Shortcuts**: Every in-app shortcut is now customizable — you can freely reassign keys, with a dedicated shortcuts settings page to manage them. In the player, long-pressing left/right now enters continuous speed playback, instead of only triggering a single fast-forward/rewind as before.
* **Player Zoom & Rotate Gestures**: You can now zoom and rotate the player picture with a two-finger pinch (trackpad/touchscreen), or by holding Shift or Ctrl and scrolling the mouse wheel.
* **Player Display Controls**: The player offers per-player screen fit modes (Fit / Stretch / Fill / 16:9 / 4:3) that apply only to the current player, plus a color-vision assist filter with three color-blindness / color-weakness modes — now available for both the player and the gallery, each with its own independent switch.
* **Download Categories**: The download list now supports custom categories, choosing a category when downloading, batch deletion by date range / N days ago, and preserving scroll position after deletion. The completion toast moved to the bottom and is tappable to jump.
* **Smarter Search**: The search dialog layout was improved (Oreno3D entry / Google search / history confirmation), you can browse with only filters and sorting (no keyword required), and the results page can save and restore search conditions.
* **Tag Localization**: Oreno3d and iwara tags both support localization toggling, long-press for details, and a copy & translation-correction feedback dialog.
* **Smoother iOS Navigation**: Improved the back-navigation experience for iOS users on some pages.
* **Multi-Provider AI Translation**: AI translation now supports multiple providers — OpenAI (and compatible endpoints), Anthropic native, and Google native — with streaming output and collapsible reasoning. You can choose a provider preset and fetch the model list in settings.
* **Local Content Blocking**: Hide videos and galleries by keyword, regular expression, or author user ID. Rules are stored locally and included in the settings backup, with separate import/export for block rules. Blocked cards show a frosted mask and can be revealed temporarily.
* **Click-to-Seek Timestamps**: Time codes in video descriptions and comments (e.g. 1:23, 1:23:45) are now highlighted and tappable to jump straight to that point in the video.

## 🐛 Bug Fixes

* **Network Experience**: Improved the user network experience.
* **Video Preview Popup**: Fixed an issue where the video preview popup could not be displayed.
* **Navigation Deadlock**: Fixed back-navigation deadlocks caused by nested back interception.
* **Download List Stability**: Fixed download-list refresh races, duplicated history entries, and lists not refreshing after deletion.
* **Author Video Count**: Fixed the author profile showing a bogus video count stuck at 21.
* **Windows Fullscreen**: Fixed a page rendering issue when entering in-app fullscreen on Windows.
* **Startup Site**: The app now always starts on the main site instead of the remembered AI site, avoiding related issues.
* **iOS Sideloading**: Ad-hoc signed the embedded frameworks before packaging, fixing AltStore / SideStore sideload errors.

## 🛠 Optimizations

* **Narrow-screen Playback**: On narrow portrait screens you can now swipe up during playback to shrink the player to its minimum height.
* **Popular Filters**: Popular video / gallery filters gained a persistent entry and quick favorite-tag filtering.
* **Profile & Navigation Polish**: Author profile action buttons changed to labeled icon+text pills, and exiting from the home root now asks for confirmation.
* **Android Adaptive Icon**: Added adaptive launcher icons to fit the circular icon masks used by some regional ROMs.
* **Haptics & Stability**: Improved player haptic feedback (screen / progress horizontal-swipe seek), scaled download list items to screen width for a more compact small-screen layout, fixed several bugs, and improved overall stability.
* **Watch History Cleanup**: Added an auto-cleanup toggle with a retention-days setting, plus deleting history within a selected date range.
* **Customizable Navigation**: You can now hide the Forum and News navigation items for a cleaner navigation bar.
* **Playback & Downloads**: Added a default / auto playback speed setting, support for external SD/TF cards as a custom download location, and (on desktop) restored the "remember last volume" option.
* **First-time Gesture Guide**: Added a one-time gesture guide the first time you open a video detail page.

## 📢 How to Provide Feedback

* Leave a comment in the [GitHub issues section](https://github.com/FoxSensei001/LoveIwara/issues)
* Or join the [discussion group](https://t.me/+ITH4CV6Z_sc2ZWVl)

Your feedback is extremely valuable to us. Thank you for your continued support and help! 🚀

---

* **快捷键自定义**：应用内所有快捷键均支持自定义配置，可自由切换按键，并新增了快捷键设置页面供你管理。播放器中长按左/右可直接进入倍速播放，而不再像过去那样只触发一次快进/后退。

## 🐛 问题修复

* **网络体验**：优化用户网络体验。
* **视频预览弹窗**：修复了视频预览弹窗不能显示的问题。
* **返回卡死修复**：修复嵌套返回拦截导致的返回卡死。
* **下载列表稳定性**：修复下载列表刷新竞态、历史区重复项，以及删除后不刷新等问题。
* **作者作品数**：修复作者主页视频数恒显示 21 的错误。
* **Windows 全屏**：修复 Windows 端应用内全屏时页面显示异常的问题。
* **启动站点**：启动时强制进入主站而非记忆中的 AI 站，避免相关异常。
* **iOS 侧载修复**：打包前对内嵌 framework 进行 ad-hoc 签名，修复 AltStore / SideStore 侧载报错。

## 🛠 优化内容

* **窄屏播放优化**：窄屏竖屏播放状态下支持上滑，将播放器收缩至最小高度。
* **热门筛选优化**：热门视频 / 图库筛选项新增常驻入口与收藏快捷筛选。
* **主页与导航打磨**：作者主页操作按钮改为图标 + 文字胶囊样式，首页退出增加二次确认。

* **历史记录清理**：新增自动清理超期记录开关与保留天数设置，并支持按所选时间范围批量删除。

* **播放与下载**：新增默认 / 自动播放速度设置，下载路径支持外置 SD/TF 卡作为自定义存储位置，桌面端恢复“记住上次音量”选项。
* **首次手势指引**：首次进入视频详情页时新增一次性手势操作指引。

## 📢 如何反馈问题

* 欢迎在 [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/FoxSensei001/LoveIwara/issues) 中留言反馈
* 或加入 [讨论群](https://t.me/+ITH4CV6Z_sc2ZWVl)

你的反馈对我们非常重要，感谢一直以来的支持与帮助！🚀

apps.name: Pica Comic
apps.subtitle: A comic app built with Flutter, supporting multiple comic sources.
apps.versionDescription:
## 4.2.11 (2026-04-06)

### 更新说明
* 修复 jm 搜索 #232 by [AriaArcadia](https://github.com/AriaArcadia)
* 修复 nhentai 的若干功能
* 修复下载漫画时预期页数与实际不符的问题
* 改进 hitomi 的语言过滤 https://github.com/Pacalini/PicaComic/issues/199#issuecomment-3738159264

### 安装&更新
* (Android) 安装时不会覆盖 4.0.4 及之前的版本。用户数据通用，请在设置中手动迁移。
* IOS、MacOS 版本未经任何测试，不受任何支持.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Pacalini/PicaComic/compare/v4.2.10...v4.2.11
